name: io.github.perceptdot/vercel
title: Perceptdot Vercel
description: AI agent vision for Vercel deployments with automatic ROI measurement and reporting. perceptdot.com

environmentVariables.name: VERCEL_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Vercel API token. Generate at vercel.com/account/tokens.

environmentVariables.name: VERCEL_TEAM_ID
environmentVariables.description: Vercel team ID, needed when the token is scoped to a team.

environmentVariables.name: PERCEPT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: perceptdot API key (free 200 checks at perceptdot.com)
